TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Nadan = Gaga mniq Taytung Cangpinsyang ka alang Nadan. 25 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 73 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 81% niqan 59 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 19% niqan 14 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun75%, Tayal1%, Truku1%, ni rahuq na o3%.
S.PHON: = nadan = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ʦaŋpinsjaŋ ka alaŋ nadan. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, ** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun**%, tajal*%, tɾuku*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Nadan = Gaga mniq Taytung Cangpinsyang ka alang Nadan. 25 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 73 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 81% niqan 59 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 19% niqan 14 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun75%, Tayal1%, Truku1%, ni rahuq na o3%.
S.PHON: = nadan = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ʦaŋpinsjaŋ ka alaŋ nadan. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, ** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun**%, tajal*%, tɾuku*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
